description: Complete QA three-orbit partition of {1,...,9}^2 under qa_step. Cosmos 72 pairs period 24 = pi(9); Satellite 8 pairs period 8; Singularity 1 pair (9,9) period 1. Counts sum to 72+8+1=81=9^2. Matches Pudelko arXiv:2510.24882 complete period classification of all m^2=81 initial pairs in (Z/9Z)^2.
